name: wealthfolio-navigation-menu
title: Navigation Menu
description: Primitives for building a navigation menu.

files.content:
import {
  NavigationMenu,
  NavigationMenuList,
  NavigationMenuItem,
  NavigationMenuLink,
  NavigationMenuBadge,
} from "@/registry/new-york/ui/navigation-menu";
import Link from "next/link";

function _NavigationMenu(
  props: React.ComponentPropsWithRef<typeof NavigationMenu>,
) {
  return (
    <NavigationMenu {...props}>
      <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuLink asChild>
            <Link href="features">Features</Link>
          </NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuLink asChild>
            <Link href="connect">
              Connect
              <NavigationMenuBadge>New</NavigationMenuBadge>
            </Link>
          </NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuLink asChild>
            <Link href="add-ons">Add-ons</Link>
          </NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuLink asChild>
            <Link href="docs">Docs</Link>
          </NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
          <NavigationMenuLink asChild>
            <Link href="blog">Blog</Link>
          </NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
      </NavigationMenuList>
    </NavigationMenu>
  );
}

export { _NavigationMenu as NavigationMenu };
